user.title: Connect to AAT Multiroom
user.description: Enter the IP address of your AAT amplifier. The default TCP port is 5000.

naming.title: Name your zones and inputs
naming.description: Give each zone and input a friendly name. Leave an input blank to hide it. These names are what you'll use with Alexa.

error.cannot_connect: Couldn't reach the AAT at that address. Check the IP, the TCP port, and that the AAT is powered on.

init.title: Edit names
init.description: Update the friendly names for zones and inputs. Leave an input blank to hide it.
